teleop_intent.description: Operator/XR retargeter intent before RDF validation and curation.

executed_control.description: Robot controller command actually applied to the simulator or robot.

learning_action.description: Candidate learning action; not learning-ready until evaluator and curator accept the trajectory.

retargeted_robot_action.description: Legacy compatibility alias for the applied robot command.

teleop_pipeline.description: Pipeline role metadata that separates teleop intent, executed control, and candidate learning action.
